text: “Evaluation center” means a facility which is approved by the Division of Public and Behavioral Health of the Department of Health and Human Services to provide an evaluation of an offender to a court to determine if the offender has an alcohol or other substance use disorder. markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484C
##### § 484C.050 — “Evaluation center” defined.

“Evaluation center” means a facility which is approved by the Division of Public and Behavioral Health of the Department of Health and Human Services to provide an evaluation of an offender to a court to determine if the offender has an alcohol or other substance use disorder. The term includes a facility operated by a court or other governmental agency.

The term includes a facility operated by a court or other governmental agency.
